[short] skip
[!git] skip

env GOPROXY=direct

! go mod download
stderr '^go: vcs-test.golang.org/notexist.git/subdir@v0.1.0: reading vcs-test\.golang\.org/notexist.git/subdir/go\.mod at revision subdir/v0\.1\.0: '

-- go.mod --
module test

go 1.18

require vcs-test.golang.org/notexist.git/subdir v0.1.0
